function.description: Cycle-independent architectural behavior coverage derived from function_model.

bins.description: All ALU/MOV/CMP operation families execute and match architectural writeback/flag behavior.
N/Z/C/V formulas are observed for arithmetic, compare, logical, and move cases.
Taken and not-taken branch paths update PC and flush behavior as specified.
Aligned LDR/STR word behavior updates registers or memory side effects correctly.
Illegal decode raises trap_code=1 and suppresses retire.
Instruction/data HRESP error raises trap_code=2 and suppresses retire.
Misaligned word access raises trap_code=3 before data bus launch.
IF, ID, and EX/WB pipeline stages all become active under directed tests.
Instruction fetch wait-state hold behavior is observed.
Data memory wait-state hold behavior is observed.
Load-use one-bubble stall behavior is observed.
Taken branch flush timing is observed.
Trap-entry FSM transition and flush timing are observed.
Instruction side single-outstanding request limit is exercised.
Data side single-outstanding request limit is exercised.
Nominal instruction stream CPI target is measured or explicitly waived.
2:1 core_clk to bus_clk cycle relationship is represented in coverage evidence.

coverage_goals.line: >= 90% instrumented line coverage or explicit waiver
coverage_goals.branch: >= 85% instrumented branch coverage or explicit waiver
coverage_goals.fsm: 100% declared FSM states and legal transitions covered

plan.description: reset and flush force idle
pcdown reaches retire
step_en low holds state
fetch_en loads instr_data.
retire pulse observed.
flush returns all observable state to idle.

limitations.rtl_observed_coverage: Functional bins are not covered until a passing scoreboard row with real rtl_observed signals hits them: alu_flag_update_matrix, alu_ops_all, branch_flush_cycles, branch_taken_not_taken, core_bus_frequency_ratio, cpi_nominal_stream, dmem_wait_cycles, hazard_stall_cycles, if_wait_cycles, load_store_word, outstanding_data_depth, outstanding_instruction_depth, ... +3
limitations.line: SSOT requests line/code coverage, but coverage.info has no DA records.
limitations.branch: SSOT requests branch coverage, but coverage.info has no BRDA/BRF records for this tool flow.
